title: SR 17-5: Procedures for a Banking Entity to Request an Extension of the One-Year Seeding Period for a Covered Fund
title_normalized: Procedures for a Banking Entity to Request an Extension of the One-Year Seeding Period for a Covered Fund
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 17-5
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: This guidance applies to all banking entities that are subject to section 13 of the Bank Holding Company Act (also known as the Volcker Rule). See footnote 1 for further detail on applicability.
bm25_text: SR 17-5 Procedures for a Banking Entity to Request an Extension of the One-Year Seeding Period for a Covered Fund This guidance applies to all banking entities that are subject to section 13 of the Bank Holding Company Act (also known as the Volcker Rule). See footnote 1 for further detail on applicability. BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF SUPERVISION AND REGULATION SUBJECT:
